---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement, a new feature, or a new provider integration
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

<!--
Before opening: please search existing issues. If a similar request
already exists, add a 👍 reaction and your specific use case as a
comment — that helps prioritize without duplicating the thread.
-->

## What problem are you trying to solve

<!-- Describe the user-facing pain point, not the implementation.
     Example: "When I switch from LM Studio to Ollama mid-chat,
     responses sometimes come back from the wrong model" — that
     tells us what to fix even if the proposed solution changes. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would success look like from the user's perspective?
     One or two sentences is enough; we'll figure out the
     implementation. -->

## Feature area (pick the closest one)

- [ ] Chat UX (input, streaming, message rendering)
- [ ] Provider integration (new provider, or behavior of an existing one)
- [ ] RAG / retrieval / knowledge sets
- [ ] Embeddings (model selection, indexing, backfill)
- [ ] Tab context / web-page extraction
- [ ] Sessions, history, export/import
- [ ] Settings / options page
- [ ] Performance, bundle size, or build pipeline
- [ ] Other:

## Privacy / local-first impact

<!-- This is a local-first extension. Please call out if the request
     would require:
       - any network call that didn't exist before
       - any data being sent to a non-user-configured endpoint
       - any new permission in the manifest
     This isn't a blocker — many features need new permissions — it
     just shapes the design discussion. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you've tried, similar features in other tools,
     or reasons the obvious approach is wrong. Optional. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar UX in other tools,
     anything else that helps. -->
